label: Dunning Level
description: 1 = First notice (Mahnstufe 1), 2 = Second notice, 3 = Final notice. Used by the automated dunning scheduler.
name: Dunning Type-custom_dunning_level

label: Days to Trigger
description: Level 1: days after invoice due date. Level 2/3: days after previous dunning posting date.
name: Dunning Type-custom_days_trigger
